creator: thierry@FreeBSD.org
text:
The first patch has been produced by `svn diff', and after applying the new naming scheme for patches, files/patch-src_02__clib_md5.c has been renamed to files/patch-shared__common__src__02_clib__md5.c:

$ svn st
M       Makefile
M       distinfo
D       files/patch-Makefile.in
A       files/patch-config_m4_sd__levmar.m4
A       files/patch-config_scripts_makemake
A  +    files/patch-shared__common__src__02_clib__md5.c
        > moved from files/patch-src_02__clib_md5.c
A       files/patch-shared_common_src_02__clib_calling__levmar.c
D       files/patch-src_02__clib_md5.c
        > moved to files/patch-shared__common__src__02_clib__md5.c
M       pkg-plist

If you prefer, I'm adding a new patch, produced by `diff -urN' (attached science_abinit-regular.diff).
